title: strychnos cocculoides
intro: Strychnos cocculoides, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a species of poisonous plant in the family Loganiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, Strychnos cocculoides is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are believed to promote overall health and well-being.
